text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Here you go, a souvenir. It's a local 
bear ornament I got on a recent trip.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna leave it on the windowsill.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what's up? You say your room is 
bustling with all sorts of tchotchkes 
now?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hmm. It's because your room just so happens to be the perfect size. I'll get you more souvenirs next time.

After Stay Gold popped the bear 
on the windowsill, we chatted on 
about her trip.
